flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Richland Community College rose 47% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.6k → $8.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Richland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Richland Community College rose 42% between 2006 and 2009 (14.4% → 20.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Richland Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.3k → $17.1k).
